hooks.command: $d=Join-Path (Get-Location) 'Plans'; if(Test-Path $d){ $p=Get-ChildItem $d -Filter '*-plan.html' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if($p){ $h=Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 $p.FullName; if($h -match '(?s)id=.plan-state.[^>]*>(.*?)</script>'){ $s=$matches[1].Trim(); try{ $o=$s | ConvertFrom-Json }catch{ $o=$null }; $vals=@(); if($o -and $o.status){ $vals=@($o.status.PSObject.Properties.Value) }; $done=($vals.Count -gt 0 -and -not ($vals | Where-Object { $_ -ne 'done' })); if(-not $done){ $ctx="Active plan for this repo: $($p.FullName)`n#plan-state:`n$s`nTo continue, read that file, find the next non-done phase, and proceed."; @{ hookSpecificOutput=@{ hookEventName='SessionStart'; additionalContext=$ctx } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5 } } } }
